QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_57

question.text: Annuity income received from NPS is taxed as which category of income?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Annuity income from NPS is taxed as salary income in the hands of the recipient, regardless of whether the subscriber was salaried or self-employed. **The Trap:** Many assume annuity income is taxed as 'income from other sources' or is exempt. It is specifically categorized as salary income. **Cross-Exam Context:** The EEE regime applies to contributions, returns, and lump sum. But annuity income (the pension) is fully taxable as salary. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Help clients plan their post-retirement tax liability. The annuity income will be their primary salary-equivalent income for tax purposes.
